positive: Minimalist geometric mountain landscape, rendered in a clean, retro-futuristic woodcut style. A stylized jagged mountain range dominates the background, fading into a clean, pale sky. The foreground features abstract geometric forest silhouettes (simple triangles and arcs) and stylized winding rivers. Limited color palette of deep indigo, burnt ochre, and ivory white. High contrast, clean vector aesthetic, perfect for screen printing on apparel. Centrally composed, balanced composition, clean silhouettes, detailed line work.
negative: blurry, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, low detail, bad anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, busy, photography, gradients
